## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor/cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build/installer/CI

## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet build .\WinPanX.sln -c Debug`
- [ ] `dotnet build .\WinPanX.sln -c Release`
- [ ] Manual smoke test performed (if runtime behavior changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated docs (`README.md`, `MANUAL.md`, `ARCHITECTURE.md`) where relevant
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `Unreleased`
- [ ] No generated outputs (`bin/`, `obj/`, `artifacts/`) intentionally included
